tool_args.label: Toll Violation Enforcement Action Item Approval
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA General Counsel and Corporate Secretary Paul L. Friman presented an Action Item asking the Committee to approve and move to the Board for adoption the revised toll violation enforcement regulations...the revised regulations would reduce the toll violation fee to $50 at the Bronx-Whitestone, JFK, Throgs Neck, and Verrazzano-Narrows Bridges, as well as the Queens Midtown and Hugh L. Carey Tunnels, and establish a $50 violation fee for the Congestion Relief Zone.

payload.description: Committee approved and moved to Board revised toll violation enforcement regulations reducing violation fee to $50 at Bronx-Whitestone, JFK, Throgs Neck, Verrazzano-Narrows Bridges, Queens Midtown and Hugh L. Carey Tunnels, and establishing $50 violation fee for Congestion Relief Zone.

tool_args.label: Ghost Plate Joint Operation Milestone
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA's twenty-fifth joint operation was held at the Bronx-Whitestone Bridge...since this vital partnership was established in March.

payload.description: TBTA marked 25th joint operation of inter-agency law enforcement partnership to crack down on ghost plates and toll evaders, held at Bronx-Whitestone Bridge. Partnership established in March.

tool_args.label: Flood Door Testing at TBTA Tunnels
tool_args.raw_text: storm season prep also includes a critically important operation at TBTA's two tunnels, with flood door testing at the Hugh L. Carey and Queens Midtown Tunnels. These doors were installed in 2017 as part of the Agency's long-term resiliency program.

payload.description: Flood door testing at Hugh L. Carey and Queens Midtown Tunnels. Doors installed in 2017 as part of long-term resiliency program. Overnight tests of 20-ton doors designed to prevent water from flooding tunnels.

tool_args.label: B&T Total Paid Traffic June 2024 vs June 2023
